title: ORIGINS SMP S2
description: Modpack with Origins and a bunch of other mods, made to make you have a great Origins experience. There are tons of different origins to choose from.
body:
This modpack is a fanmade modpack that uses Origins and many other mods to create a simple and fun experience for people to play on. This modpack could be helpful for people who just want to play with their friends, or people who just want to have a good time playing a world by themselves. This modpack includes communication mods like simple voice chat and essential, I will update this modpack over time to make it even more fun to play on, but without adding too many mods. Have a great day, and have fun!
Make sure to check out the mods that were used in this modpack, because of course there wouldn't be modpacks without the mods.

Origins- Over 50 unique origins to choose from with different weaknesses and strengths

Adventure- There are many different things to explore, while venturing across your world you may find temples, castles, volcanos, and more.

Combat- Vanilla combat, but with added weapons from simply swords and other mods.

Multiplayer- Using mods like essential, you can host your world to your friends and have epic battles, or just explore and build together.

Building- Tons of new blocks to choose from while building, and tons of terrain to build your house on.

Cosmetics- With cosmetica, there are hundreds of cosmetics to choose from to customize your look.
